scripts.dev: pnpm --filter @codio/browser-use-protocol build && concurrently -k -n renderer,main,electron -c cyan,magenta,green "vite --host 127.0.0.1 --port 5173 --strictPort" "tsc -p tsconfig.main.json --watch --preserveWatchOutput" "wait-on tcp:5173 dist-main/main/main.js && cross-env CODIO_RENDERER_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 electron ."
scripts.test: pnpm typecheck && tsc -p tsconfig.main.json && node --test test/*.test.mjs
